title: Integrate Google AdSense on the website

requirements.text: Add the Google AdSense auto-ads script tag to the HTML entry point (frontend/index.html) in the <head> section, using a placeholder AdSense publisher ID (ca-pub-XXXXXXXXXX) that the user can easily replace with their actual publisher ID once their site is approved by Google AdSense.

quotes: can you please integrate Google AdSense for me so I can sign up so I can sign this website up with Google AdSense

acceptanceCriteria: The AdSense auto-ads <script> tag is present in the <head> of frontend/index.html with the async attribute and the correct AdSense script URL format (https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/pagead/js/adsbygoogle.js?client=ca-pub-XXXXXXXXXX).
A clearly visible comment in the HTML marks where the user must replace 'ca-pub-XXXXXXXXXX' with their actual AdSense publisher ID.
The existing page title, font imports, and other head elements remain intact.

requirements.text: Add a dedicated AdSense display ad unit component (AdBanner.tsx) that renders a responsive Google AdSense ad slot using the <ins class='adsbygoogle'> element, with a placeholder ad slot ID that the user can replace. Place this component in visible, non-intrusive positions on the HomePage: once below the hero section and once above the footer.

quotes: can you please integrate Google AdSense for me so I can sign up so I can sign this website up with Google AdSense

acceptanceCriteria: A reusable AdBanner component exists at frontend/src/components/AdBanner.tsx that renders an AdSense <ins> element with data-ad-client and data-ad-slot attributes.
The component calls (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({}) on mount via useEffect.
AdBanner is rendered on the HomePage below the hero section and above the footer section.
Placeholder ad slot IDs are clearly commented so the user knows to replace them with real slot IDs from their AdSense dashboard.
The component is styled to be responsive (data-ad-format='auto' and data-full-width-responsive='true').
Existing homepage sections and layout are not disrupted.

constraints: Use a placeholder publisher ID (ca-pub-XXXXXXXXXX) and placeholder ad slot IDs with clear comments so the user can substitute their real AdSense credentials after site approval.
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/.
nonGoals: Obtaining or verifying the user's actual Google AdSense publisher ID or ad slot IDs.
Implementing server-side ad logic or backend changes.
Adding any paid or premium ad-blocking bypass logic.
Modifying the AdSense approval process — this only adds the required code snippets to the site.
